title: Audio Player
description: A composable audio playback component with play/pause, seek, time display, and playback speed controls.

title: Bar Visualizer
description: Audio frequency band visualizer with agent state animations. Renders a row of animated bars driven by a MediaStream via Web Audio's AnalyserNode, with built-in demo mode.

title: Conversation
description: A scroll-aware chat container that auto-sticks to the bottom as new messages stream in.

title: Components
description: Browse the available components in svagent-ui.

title: Live Waveform
description: Real-time canvas-based audio waveform visualizer with microphone input and customizable rendering modes.

title: Matrix
description: Retro dot-matrix LED display with circular cells and smooth animations. Supports static patterns, animated frame sequences, and VU meter mode.

title: Message
description: A chat message component with avatar and content slots.

title: Mic Selector
description: Dropdown for selecting an input audio device with mute toggle and live waveform preview of the selected microphone.

title: Response
description: A streaming-friendly text response component for AI agent output.

title: Scrub Bar
description: An audio timeline scrubber with progress, draggable thumb, and time labels.

title: Shimmering Text
description: An animated shimmering text effect, ideal for loading and "thinking" states.

title: Speech Input
description: A compact speech-to-text input component with a provider-agnostic transcription adapter. Ships with a Web Speech API adapter for demos; users supply their own for ElevenLabs Scribe, Deepgram, or other providers.

title: Transcript Viewer
description: Synchronized transcript with audio playback. Highlights each word as it's spoken, supports seeking via scrub bar, and exposes a compound-component API with provider-agnostic character-alignment data.

title: Voice Button
description: Stateful button with integrated live waveform feedback for voice recording, success/error states, and keyboard shortcut slots.

title: Waveform
description: Canvas-based audio waveform visualization components with recording, playback scrubbing, and microphone input support.
